hooks.command: $json = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = if ($json.tool_response.filePath) { $json.tool_response.filePath } else { $json.tool_input.file_path }; if ($f -and $f -match '\.go$') { Push-Location D:/code/blog/blog; try { go fmt $f 2>$null } finally { Pop-Location } }

$json = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = if ($json.tool_response.filePath) { $json.tool_response.filePath } else { $json.tool_input.file_path }; if ($f -and $f -match '\.(vue|ts|js)$') { Push-Location D:/code/blog/price_recorder_vue; try { npx prettier --write $f 2>$null } finally { Pop-Location } }

$json = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $json.tool_input.file_path; if ($f -and $f -match '[/\\]\.env') { Write-Output '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Protected: .env files contain credentials and should not be directly edited"}' }
